DISCOVERY 612, MOHEARING HELD AND TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: MOTION OF DEFENDANTS AND CROSS-COMPLAINANTS MARIA EUNICE REYES-VANEGAS AND SOLEA M. REYES TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO FORM INTERROGATORY NO. 17.1 IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED. PLAINTIFF'S FAILURE TO RESPOND WAS A MISUSE OF THE DISCOVERY PROCESS. PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO RESPOND TO FORM INTERROGATORY NO. 17.1 AS TO REQUEST FOR ADMISSION NOS. 11-13 WITHIN 15 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED AGAINST PLAINTIFF IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,120, TO BE PAID WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. ORDER WAS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.

Motion For Order Compelling Responses To Form Interrogatory No. 17 And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Apr-03-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Robert P. Gates, Esq., for defendant and moving party: Maria Eunice Reyes-Vanegas
Michelle Alvarez, Esq., for Plaintiff and Opposing party: Theotista I. Ortiz

RULING: HEARING HELD AND TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: Motion Of Defendants And Cross-Complainants Maria Eunice Reyes-Vanegas and Solea M. Reyes To Compel Responses To Form Interrogatory No. 17.1 is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Plaintiff is ordered to respond to Form Interrogatory No. 17.1 as to Request For Admission Nos. 11-13 within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded against Plaintiff in the amount of $1,120, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Order was signed in open court. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.
